description_long: This jewelry piece features a striking geometric design with a prominent emerald-green gemstone set in a gold-toned, diamond-shaped top section. Below the gemstone, two symmetrical, gear-like arms with serrated edges extend outward, giving the piece a mechanical and industrial flair. The central body is circular, adorned with layered metallic elements in gold, purple, and black, and accented by angular motifs and small spherical details. The lower section tapers into a pointed, shield-like form, further embellished with a dark, glossy orb. The overall construction suggests a blend of Art Deco and steampunk influences, with intricate layering and bold, contrasting shapes. The surface finish is predominantly metallic and glossy, with some matte accents for visual depth.
description: A geometric, gold-toned pendant with an emerald-green gemstone, gear-like arms, and layered metallic accents in purple and black, blending Art Deco and steampunk styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the emerald-green gemstone, gear-like arms, layered circular body, and pointed lower section with a glossy orb.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the pendant's flat profile and the layered construction of its metallic components.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly solid gold-toned back with minimal ornamentation and the geometric outline of the piece.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the flatness and stacked layers, with visible protrusions from the gear-like arms.
